description: Triggering eval set for Access to Business skill

test_cases.prompt: I have a startup idea and need help figuring out if it's worth pursuing
Help me build my investor binder for a pre-seed round
I need to calculate my burn rate and runway
Write me a cold email to send to potential customers
Should I form an LLC or a C-Corp?
I'm stuck and overwhelmed with my startup. I don't know what to do next.
/pitch
Help me write a pitch deck for my SaaS startup
What's my unit economics — CAC, LTV, payback period?
I need to hire my first employee. What should I offer for equity?
Do I need to be HIPAA compliant if I'm building a health tech app?
Help me draft a SaaS subscription agreement for my first enterprise customer
What accelerators and grants are available in Missouri?
I need to write a monthly investor update email
/start
I need to make money fast. What's the quickest revenue I can generate?
Help me set up my bookkeeping and chart of accounts
Should I file a provisional patent for my software?
I'm a founder dealing with burnout and rejection. How do I keep going?
What's the weather in St. Louis today?
Help me write a co-parenting communication log
Write me a one-sheet for my startup to leave behind after investor meetings
I need to negotiate my first enterprise contract. They sent their paper.
Help me prepare for a board meeting and draft an update
We need to lay off 3 people. Help me handle this.
I have no revenue yet. What's the fastest way to make my first dollar?
Give me customer interview scripts for discovery calls
How should I price my SaaS product? I'm not sure about tiers vs flat rate.
I need to analyze my competitors and build a battlecard
How do I build a network as a first-time founder? I don't know anyone in the startup world.
Help me plan a 90-day sprint for my pre-seed startup
What should I automate first? I'm doing everything manually and it's killing me.
What tools and software should I use as an early-stage startup?
What are my options for funding besides VC? I'm considering grants and bootstrapping.
I can't manage my time. How should a founder structure their week?
I'm an advisor working with 5 portfolio companies. Help me run a diagnostic.
Should I raise funding or bootstrap? I can't decide.
Should I build my own analytics or buy a tool? Build vs buy decision.
Help me set up Stripe for my SaaS billing and subscriptions
What should I be checking off each week as a seed-stage founder?
What does SAFE note mean? I keep hearing startup terms I don't understand.
Help me prepare for my advisor session with a founder tomorrow
What's a good recipe for chicken parmesan?
Help me plan my wedding budget and timeline
I need help with my college application essay
Can you explain quantum computing to me?
Help me write a resume for a software engineering job
I need a personal budget spreadsheet for my household
Help me file my personal tax return
How do I train for a marathon?
What accelerators and VC firms are in the Bay Area? How do I form a company in California?
What traction metrics should I have at pre-seed? Am I ready to raise?
What's a burn multiple? And what's the magic number for SaaS?
My co-founder and I keep fighting about priorities. How do we resolve this?
I feel like a fraud. Everyone at this accelerator is smarter than me.
I got rejected by 15 investors in a row. I don't know if I should keep going.
How do I position my product and pick a marketing channel?
Help me write LinkedIn content and a launch plan for my new feature
What's my burn multiple? Help me build a financial model.
I need to build SOPs for my team and figure out our operating cadence
Should I build an MVP with code or use no-code tools? What's the fastest way to ship?
Help me plan my fundraising strategy. When should I raise a seed round?
What startup accelerators are in Austin? What about Texas incentives and formation?
I need to write an offer letter and onboard my first hire. What equity should I give?
Help me write a press release for my product launch
I need to set up a waitlist page and launch email sequence for my community
Help me draft a partnership proposal and vendor negotiation letter
I need a decision memo template and OKR format for my team standup
Help me onboard a new customer and set up an NPS survey
I need to protect my startup's intellectual property. Should I trademark first or patent?
We handle student data. Do we need to be FERPA compliant?
Help me draft a master services agreement for a consulting engagement
I need help with my startup's bookkeeping. What chart of accounts should I use?
What's the best entity type for my situation? LLC vs C-Corp vs S-Corp?
When should I make my first full-time hire vs keep using contractors?
Help me create a GDPR privacy policy and handle CCPA compliance
What does SOC 2 compliance involve? We're getting enterprise security questionnaires.
Help me write a demo script and speaker notes for my investor presentation
Can you help me organize my cat's birthday party?
What's the best programming language to learn as a beginner?
